nodes.label: AI as formatting and synthesizing tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI everyday in small capacities. Mostly editing my writing

nodes.label: AI for summarization and research
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for visual interpretation
nodes.grounding_span: AI does a great job summarizing and categorizing

nodes.label: AI for data analysis
nodes.label_negative: AI as unsuitable for nuanced product content
nodes.grounding_span: I've begun to dip my toes into using AI for data analysis

nodes.label: Workplace pressure to adopt AI for efficiency
nodes.label_negative: Relaxed individual choice in AI use
nodes.grounding_span: there's been growing pressure across departments to use it

nodes.label: AI as complement to human-centered work
nodes.grounding_span: I continue to refine my presentation skills. I don't think AI is at a point yet where it could seamlessly facilitate and interact with customers

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: I write very technical product-specific papers

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to also use it to help automate more rote tasks

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I continue to refine my presentation skills

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI summaries
nodes.grounding_span: AI does a great job summarizing and categorizing

nodes.label: Frustration with AI fabrications
nodes.grounding_span: It was not able to interpret any of the visual elements

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to integrate it more into other, more complex tasks

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inaccuracy in content creation
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like using AI to generate new content on it's own

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I go back and forth. I'll make subtle tweaks

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't like using AI to generate new content on it's own because it doesn't have a good enough understanding of the very nuanced product
